chapter_title.en: Chapter on What Necessitates Discretionary Punishment, Legal Punishment, Stoning, Execution, and Exile in Adultery

text: 4999 - وَ رَوَى اَلْعَلاَءُ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ مُسْلِمٍ عَنْ أَحَدِهِمَا عَلَيْهِمَا اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ: "إِذَا جَامَعَ اَلرَّجُلُ وَلِيدَةَ اِمْرَأَتِهِ فَعَلَيْهِ مَا عَلَى اَلزَّانِي".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4999 - Al-Alaa narrated from Muhammad ibn Muslim, who reported from one of the two Imams (peace be upon them), who said:
"If a man has intercourse with the slave woman of his wife, then upon him is the same punishment as that of a fornicator."
